name: @codex-web/desktop
description: Codex Web desktop shell powered by Electron
author: Payton-Lee

scripts.pack: npm run build && npm run prepare:bundle && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --dir
scripts.dist:win: npm run build && npm run prepare:bundle && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --win nsis
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build && npm run prepare:bundle && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac dmg
